headline: Sam Altman Molotov Cocktail Attacks Highlight Growing Public Anger Toward AI
summary: OpenAI CEO Sam Altman, perhaps the most-recognizable face attached to the AI revolution, was the target of a Molotov cocktail attack on his home in San Francisco late last week, police confirmed.  No injuries were reported, but Altman was clearly shaken as he discussed the attack in a blog post shortly after the Friday incident.  “I empathize with anti-technology sentiments and clearly technology isn’t always good for everyone,” he wrote.

content.title: Sam Altman Molotov Cocktail Attacks Highlight Growing Public Anger Toward AI
content.summary: OpenAI CEO Sam Altman, perhaps the most-recognizable face attached to the AI revolution, was the target of a Molotov cocktail attack on his home in San Francisco late last week, police confirmed.  No injuries were reported, but Altman was clearly shaken as he discussed the attack in a blog post shortly after the Friday incident.  “I empathize with anti-technology sentiments and clearly technology isn’t always good for everyone,” he wrote.

headline: Is Wall Street beginning to look past Iran war risks?
summary: As US stock futures (ES=F, NQ=F, YM=F) are rising in Tuesday's pre-market trading after all three of the market indexes closed higher yesterday, are investors beginning to look past the risks of the Iran war? President Trump ordered a naval blockade to bar access to Iranian ports on the Strait of Hormuz, which went into effect on Monday morning. Yahoo Finance Head of News Myles Udland and Kelly Intelligence founder Kevin Kelly discuss the outlook shifts from several corners of the market over the past couple of months.

content.title: Is Wall Street beginning to look past Iran war risks?
content.description:
As US stock futures (ES=F, NQ=F, YM=F) are rising in Tuesday's pre-market trading after all three of the market indexes closed higher yesterday, are investors beginning to look past the risks of the Iran war?

President Trump ordered a naval blockade to bar access to Iranian ports on the Strait of Hormuz, which went into effect on Monday morning.

Yahoo Finance Head of News Myles Udland and Kelly Intelligence founder Kevin Kelly discuss the outlook shifts from several corners of the market over the past couple of months.
